description: Coding-engineering subagents (code-explorer, code-architect, debug-investigator, test-engineer-agent) — trace, plan, root-cause, test.

cases.prompt: Trace how authentication works in a typical Flask app: where is the login route, how is the session created, how is the current user resolved?
In a Python codebase, how would you find all callers of a function named process_order?
Plan a change to add rate-limiting middleware to an Express.js API. Which files would you touch and why?
Design a caching layer for a Postgres-backed read-heavy service. What components and trade-offs?
A test intermittently fails with a race condition: 'IndexError: list index out of range'. Walk through a 4-step root-cause investigation.
Users report a 500 error on the checkout page but it doesn't happen locally. How do you reproduce it?
Write a failing pytest test for a function that should return the nth Fibonacci number but currently returns wrong values for n>10.
A billing module has 40% test coverage. Propose the 5 most important test cases to add first.
Memory usage grows steadily in a Node.js service over 48h then OOMs. Form a falsifiable hypothesis and a test for it.
Propose a refactor to split a 2000-line god-class UserManager into cohesive components.
